indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Rows of chairs obstruct the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: lack of unobstructed floor area
indicators.rationale: The rows of chairs create a continuous barrier across the entire floor, preventing any open space for yoga.

indicators.name: several tables
indicators.rationale: Tables are placed in the middle of the floor, further obstructing the open space required for yoga.

indicators.name: lack of natural light
indicators.rationale: The ceiling lights provide artificial lighting, which may not be suitable for the calming atmosphere required for yoga.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the obstructive seating arrangement, lack of unobstructed floor space, and artificial lighting. The score of 1 reflects the complete absence of any open floor area suitable for yoga practice.
